name: Wheateana Mix
recipeIngredient: 1/8 cup farina (yellow grits or corn meal)
Raisins or other dried sweet fruit
Spices, if desired (e.g., nutmeg or cinnamon)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the farina, Wheateana, and salt.
2. Add raisins and spices, if using.
3. Pour in one cup of water and stir until well combined.
4. Microwave on high for 2 minutes and 40 seconds, or until the water boils for about 15 seconds.
5. Remove from microwave and add rolled oats (wheat, rye, etc.) to adjust runniness as desired.
6. Stir in honey, if desired.
7. Add non-fat milk and stir gently.
8. Return the bowl to the microwave and heat on Defrost power level for 2 minutes and 30 seconds.
9. If possible, program your microwave to heat at high for 30 seconds, followed by Defrost for 2 minutes and 30 seconds.
10. Allow the mixture to cool before serving. The flavor improves if made the night before and enjoyed in the morning.
